body:

 * **Highlights:** Known for dispatching "Service Pro" vans that are fully stocked with springs, cables, and rollers to ensure same-day resolution without needing a second trip.

## Common Urgent Issues & Safety Tips

> ⚠️ **Safety Warning:** If you heard a loud bang and your door won't budge, your **torsion spring** is likely broken. Do not attempt to force the door open manually or use the electric opener, as this can burn out the motor, snap the cables, or cause the heavy door to crash down. [Garage Door Repair in Pleasanton, CA](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/pleasanton#:~:text=Reach%20a%20live%20operator%20any,always%20a%20broken%20torsion%20spring.)[Garage Door Repair in Pleasanton, CA](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/pleasanton#:~:text=The%20spring%20counterbalances%20the%20full,up%20to%20handle%20same%2Dday.)

When you call, it helps to let the dispatcher know if you are experiencing:

  * **A door stuck open:** This is a security priority; companies will usually bump you up the list.

  * **A car trapped inside:** Emphasize that you cannot leave your home so they prioritize your service call.

  * **An off-track door:** Stop using it immediately so you don't permanently bend the steel panels.

Would you like help troubleshooting the specific issue you're experiencing before you call a technician?
